title: Whenever I click on a Board it opens in a New Tab within my web browser
excerpt: Everytime I click on a Board in the ‘My Work’ view it opens a new tab on my web browser. this leaves me with lots of new tabs open when working on multiple projects and i don’t see why it can’t just come up in the curren…

posts.author: hbunn (Harry Bunn)
posts.cookedHtml: Everytime I click on a Board in the ‘My Work’ view it opens a new tab on my web browser. this leaves me with lots of new tabs open when working on multiple projects and i don’t see why it can’t just come up in the current tab i have open rather than filling my browser full of tabs.
